description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a simplified, cartoon-like appearance. The figure has a round head with a smiling face, short hair, and no visible facial details beyond the eyes and mouth. The upper body is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted shirt, while the lower body features slim pants and blocky shoes. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are rendered as simple, flat shapes without fingers. The overall proportions are slightly exaggerated, with large feet and hands relative to the body, and the figure is designed to be easily recognizable in urban environments.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with a round head, short hair, fitted shirt, slim pants, and blocky shoes, arms extended outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiling face, short hair, fitted shirt, slim pants, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the straight arm, and the side silhouette of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side outline of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted shirt and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
